app.title: TaskBandit API
auth.bootstrap_required: Create the first household before using account signup.
auth.email_in_use: That email address is already in use.
auth.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
auth.local_disabled: Local sign-in is currently disabled for this household.
auth.password_reset_completed: Your password was updated. You can sign in with the new password now.
auth.password_reset_email_expiry: This reset link stays active for one hour.
auth.password_reset_email_intro: Use this TaskBandit link to choose a new password:
auth.password_reset_invalid: That password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a fresh one.
auth.password_reset_requested: If that email belongs to a local TaskBandit account, a password reset link is on the way.
auth.password_reset_unavailable: Password reset email is not available until SMTP is configured for this household.
auth.oidc_email_required: The OIDC provider did not return an email address, so TaskBandit cannot create a parent account.
auth.oidc_state_invalid: The OIDC sign-in link is invalid or has expired. Please try again.
auth.unauthorized: You need to sign in to access this resource.
bootstrap.already_initialized: TaskBandit already has an initialized household.
chores.assignee_only_submit: Only the assigned user or a parent/admin can submit this chore.
chores.takeover_request_forbidden: Only parent or admin accounts can request that someone else takes over a chore.
chores.takeover_request_only_assignee: Only the current assignee can request a takeover for this chore.
chores.invalid_takeover_request_state: This takeover request can no longer be processed.
chores.takeover_request_not_found: That takeover request could not be found.
chores.takeover_request_approval_forbidd: Only the requested household member can respond to this takeover request.
chores.takeover_request_already_pending: A takeover request for this member is already pending.
chores.takeover_request_invalid_target: Choose a different household member for this takeover request.
chores.invalid_cancel_state: Only active chores can be cancelled.
chores.occurrence_cancel_not_available: This chore does not support cancelling only one recurring occurrence.
chores.cycle_close_not_available: This chore is not part of a repeatable cycle.
chores.invalid_edit_state: This chore can no longer be edited in its current state.
chores.invalid_start_state: Only open or fix-needed chores can be started.
chores.invalid_review_state: Only chores waiting for approval can be reviewed.
chores.not_found: That chore could not be found.
chores.template_not_found: That chore template could not be found.
chores.photo_proof_required: This chore needs at least one photo proof before it can be submitted.
chores.photo_upload_invalid_type: Only image uploads are supported for chore proof.
chores.photo_upload_missing: Select a proof image before uploading.
chores.required_checklist_missing: Complete all required checklist items before submitting this chore.
members.invite_email_intro: Hi {name}, your TaskBandit household account is ready.
members.invite_email_footer: After signing in, you can change your password from the password reset flow if you want a private one.
members.invite_unavailable: Invite email cannot be sent until SMTP is configured for this household.
